title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LONGOS, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO MUNICIPALITY OF KALAYAAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5498 / 52 OG No. 6, 2968 (May, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1417, May 17, 1956 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LONGOS, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO MUNICIPALITY OF KALAYAAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Longos, province of Laguna, is changed to Municipality of Kalayaan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 17, 1956.
